agent_name.description: Human-readable name for the agent (e.g., 'ACME Clinic Answering Agent').

timezone.description: IANA timezone or similar (must come from transcripts or be listed as unknown).

business_hours.description: Copy of the business hours from the account memo for easy consumption by downstream systems.

system_prompt.description: Full system prompt used to steer the voice agent. Must embed business and safety flows without referencing internal tools.

call_transfer_protocol.description: Textual description of how and when the agent should initiate transfers.

fallback_protocol.description: Instructions for what to do when transfers fail or when information is missing.
